title: Bridge Essay: What is mood? A computational perspective.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Dependent arising — predictive processing, free energy principle, active inference as causal cognition.

**What is mood? Acomputational perspective.**. Psychol Med.. PMID: 29478431. DOI: 10.1017/S0033291718000430. The neurobiological understanding of mood, and by extension mood disorders, remains elusive despite decades of research implicating several neuromodulator systems. This review considers anew approach based on existing theories of functional brain organisation. The free energy principle (a.k.a. active inference), and its instantiation in the Bayesian brain, offers acomplete and simple formulation of mood.
